convergence_events.reason: All eight pathways had at least minimal source lineage before ranking.
The most visible source facts are film decline, consumer digital loss, and Chapter 11.
Baseline folded incentives, culture, timing, and capital into the digital-disruption/business-model story.
Technology-blindness was contradicted by Kodak's long-running digital investment and market participation.

convergence_events.dominant_conclusion: Kodak collapsed primarily from digital disruption interacting with film-profit business model rigidity.
